intro: Down a narrow alley, a hooded dealer has set out a row of stalls heaped with secondhand goods. He gives you a crooked grin and gestures at the wares.
title: The Black Market
description: A back-alley dealer fencing cheap, secondhand goods. Browse the stalls for a free mixed-tier selection, or walk away and keep the alley at your back.

1.label: Browse the stalls
1.tooltip: (+) A free mixed-tier selection of used goods
1.selected: You pick through the dealer's stalls and take your pick of the wares...

2.label: Walk away
2.selected: You decide the alley is no place to linger and move on.
